name: fundus
description: Search, save, update, and curate Christian's personal Fundus work knowledge base from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Search and curate durable work knowledge
interface.longDescription: Fundus gives Codex a local, explicit workbench for durable project, epic, domain, ticket, and architecture knowledge. It treats Fundus as evidence, keeps source code authoritative, and uses self-contained MCP tools for search, save, update, migration, archive, and verification workflows.
